arts.ttl: “Not best team in defence” – Bodø/Glimt can’t help themselves, offer Tottenham more motivational material
arts.sum: We’re not quite sure why Bodø/Glimt keep offering Tottenham motivational material ahead of their Europa League semi-final second leg, but they do. NRK cover comments from Jostein Gunderson today in which he insists Tottenham are not all that defensively and can be gotten at. Tottenham lead the Europa League semi-final 3-1 after a dominant performance The post “Not best team in defence” – Bodø/Glimt can’t help themselves, offer Tottenham more motivational material appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Bodo/Glimt player now sends two warnings to Tottenham ahead of UEFA Europa League semi-final 2nd leg
arts.sum: Tottenham are within touching distance of a European final under Ange Postecoglou. Spurs just need to ensure they do not concede twice away to Bodo/Glimt...

arts.ttl: Bodo/Glimt vs Tottenham: Time, how to watch, stats, team news
arts.sum: Everything you need to know as Tottenham Hotpsur face Bodo/Glimt in their Europa League semifinal second leg on Thursday.

arts.ttl: “It came out very wrong” – Bodø/Glimt backtracking on ‘stupid’ Tottenham comments
arts.sum: Bodø/Glimt manager Kjell Knutsen and his team are backtracking on ‘stupid’ comments made about Tottenham as they gear up for the second leg of their Europa League semi-final meeting with Ange Postecoglou’s side this week. TV2 have comments from Knutsen and Jens Petter Hauge who are pulling away after Fredrik Sjøvold spoke out against Tottenham The post “It came out very wrong” – Bodø/Glimt backtracking on ‘stupid’ Tottenham comments appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Bodo/Glimt star says Spurs not prepared for 'big disadvantage' in crunch Europa League clash
arts.sum: Odin Bjortuft has said Bodo/Glimt's plastic pitch can have a huge say on Europa League semi-final as Tottenham Hotspur head to the Arctic Circle with a 3-1 lead

arts.ttl: 'An advantage for us' - will Spurs slip up on Bodo/Glimt's artificial pitch?
arts.sum: A two-goal advantage heading into the away second leg of a Europa League knockout tie, Tottenham were in this situation four years ago - and it did not end well.

arts.ttl: Norwegian fan trades five kilos of fish for ticket to Bodø/Glimt v Tottenham
arts.sum: Supporter with spare ticket took the bait over offer Around 50,000 supporters vying for just 480 seats A Norwegian bartered five kilos of semi-dried fish for a ticket to Thursday’s semi-final clash between Bodø/Glimt and Tottenham in the Arctic Circle, as the hosts aim to become the first Norwegian club to reach a European final. Some 50,000 fans were vying for just 480 remaining tickets to the second leg of Bodø/Glimt’s Europa League semi-final. Continue reading...
